message:
📖 Fix ASCII art right box top border alignment (#77)

Add missing space in top border gap (24->25 chars) to align
with content rows below.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
